title: leptorkis elliptica
intro: Leptorkis elliptica, also known as the Round-leaved Leptorchis, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asclepiadaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Leptorkis elliptica include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antivenom for snake bites. Leptorkis elliptica can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its roots can be used to make a medicinal decoction.
